task.title: How to add bar chart
task.shortdesc: A bar chart shows values for different categories as rectangular bars. It helps you compare values across groups and quickly see differences in size. In Apps Studio, you can add a bar chart to an interface page and configure it by selecting fields for the X-axis and Y-axis. You can also adjust the chart title and style settings.

taskbody.context:
Follow these steps to add a bar chart in Apps Studio:
Open the required interface.

step.cmd: Click Chart in the widget tray.
Select Bar in the Add Chart menu.
Enter a name for the chart in the Widget Title field in the configuration panel displayed on the right side of the page.
Click on the Add Column drop-down menu from the X Axis menu under the Data tab.
Select the required column to use as the category axis and repeat the same as Step 5 to select the required columns from Y Axis menu.

info.note: You can select more than one column for both axes.

step.info: After you add the X-axis and Y-axis fields, the chart preview updates.

step.cmd: Scroll to the bottom of the page and click on Customize Series drop-down menu.
Click on Pick Color for Production icon to customise the columns which is indicated as the bar color.
step.info: In the example shown, separate colors are applied to Production and Demand.

step.cmd: Click on the Series Settings icon to configure the label.
Turn on the how Labels toggle button.
Click Apply to save the settings.

info.p: In the example shown, labels are displayed on the bars.

step.cmd: Review the bar chart details and then click Apply.
step.stepresult: The bar chart is added to the Interface page.
